summary: Iteration 39: Backend Testing for Implant Edit Lock & Faculty Case Creation - 12/12 tests PASSED (100%)

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request. Backend-only testing performed.

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Student edit phase1_approved): PASS - Student can edit implant plan at phase1_approved status (200)
Feature 2 (Student blocked phase2_approved): PASS - Student correctly blocked with 403 'Implant plan cannot be modified after Phase 2 approval'
Feature 3 (Supervisor edit all stages): PASS - Supervisor can edit at phase2_approved stage (200)
Feature 4 (Incharge edit all stages): PASS - Implant In-Charge can edit at phase2_approved stage (200)
Feature 5 (Supervisor create procedure): PASS - Returns draft status with supervisor_phase1_approved=True, supervisor_phase2_approved=True
Feature 6 (Incharge create procedure): PASS - Returns completed status with all approvals=True and fully_completed_at set
Feature 7 (Supervisor case fields): PASS - student_id=null, created_by_role=supervisor, created_by_id set correctly
Feature 8 (Incharge case fields): PASS - student_id=null, created_by_role=implant_incharge, fully_completed_at=2026-03-16T14:05:44
Feature 9 (Approval flow): PASS - Supervisor-created case has supervisor_phase1_approved=True, implant_incharge_phase1_approved=False ready for incharge approval
Feature 10 (Notifications null student): PASS - Supervisor created case without errors, incharge received notification (23 total)
Feature 11 (Student backward compat): PASS - Student creates procedure with status=draft, student_id set, no pre-approvals
Feature 12 (Supervisor sees cases): PASS - GET /api/procedures returns supervisor-created cases with created_by_role=supervisor, created_by_id correctly
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test procedures during testing: supervisor-created (69b80e385b9455b0296204a5, 69b80e385b9455b0296204a9, etc.), incharge-created (69b80e385b9455b0296204a7), student-created (69b80e385b9455b0296204ad). Existing procedures used: 69b80289f64c990b94c877c7 (phase1_approved), 69b802a0108c7efbacbe3d9d (phase2_approved)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 features for implant edit lock and faculty case creation fully verified. Key findings: 1) Students locked from editing implant plan after phase2_approved (403 returned). 2) Supervisors and Implant In-Charge can edit at ALL stages including phase2_approved. 3) Supervisor creates case with draft status, supervisor approvals pre-set (phase1 & phase2), student_id=null. 4) Incharge creates case with completed status, all approvals set, fully_completed_at timestamp. 5) Notifications work correctly with null student_id. 6) GET /api/procedures returns supervisor-created cases via created_by_id query. Existing test procedures at phase1_approved (69b80289f64c990b94c877c7) and phase2_approved (69b802a0108c7efbacbe3d9d) used for edit tests.
